allow: Bash(powershell -command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_IPAddress -notlike ''127.*'' -and $_IPAddress -notlike ''169.*''} | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-List")
Bash(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="PCC Backend 3000" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3000)
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList ''netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name=""PCC Backend 8000"" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8000'' -Verb RunAs -Wait")
Bash(npx expo install expo-camera expo-av expo-battery expo-network)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\(''dependencies'',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''expo-camera version:'', d[''version'']\)")
